name: Meetings Analyzer
description: Meeting transcript analyzer — local upload → extract → chunk → SQLite + knowledge graph → search. Summarizes transcripts via a local Ollama model, embeds chunks for semantic recall, and exports an installable agent bundle.

required.name: OMNIPARSE_SDK_PATH
required.description: Absolute path to the local Omniparse SDK entry file (index.mjs), used to parse rich document types before summarization. If unset, the app falls back to internal text/RTF/PDF-best-effort extraction and warns.

optional.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
optional.description: Base URL for a local Ollama server used for chat summarization and embeddings.

optional.name: MEETING_SUMMARY_MODEL
optional.description: Chat model used to summarize meeting transcripts via Ollama.

optional.name: MEETING_EMBED_MODEL
optional.description: Embedding model used for vector retrieval via Ollama.

optional.name: MEETING_VECTOR_STORE_PATH
optional.description: Path to the JSON vector/knowledge store file or directory.

optional.name: MEETING_LOCAL_DB_PATH
optional.description: Path to the local SQLite knowledge database file.
